TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Akihito == u siwkay niza 12 a bulad 23 a demiad, Akihito, u misingkiway. 1933 a mihcan nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Japan ayza sa ci Akihito, micakat a demiad sa i 1989 a mihcan 1 a bulad 7 a demiad. Akihito(1993.12.23 ) u saka125 a Hongtei nu Lipun. ayzaay a Hongtei. 1989.1.7 macakat, u ngangan nu Hongtei sa ci Pingchen. cyama niza sa ci Cawhe Hongtei. cina niza sa ci Singachun. u sakakaay a wawa ciniza. i zikuz nu sakatusa a palecawaw nu kitakit, inayi' tu tatengaay a kinli ku Lipun Hongtei. amiazih ku cudad atu misulit ngangan ciniza maka mangasiw 1000. mikileh maka 200 a labang atu saungay nu binawlan. maka 20 a salisin cacay a mihca. u ngangan niza u ngangan nu Hulam: śėéšĽĀŚ§©Áöá u ngangan nu Lipun: śėéšĽĀ kakuniza nasulitan nu Hulam atu Amilika Akihito is the Emperor of Japan. He is the 125th Emperor of his line according to Japan's traditional order of succession. Akihito succeeded to the Chrysanthemum Throne upon his father Emperor ShŇćwa (Hirohito)'s death on 7 January 1989. Akihito is expected to abdicate in late March 2019.
S.PHON: == akińßito == u siwkaj niza ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, akińßito, u misiŇčkiwaj. **** a mińß ¶an nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu *apan ajza sa ¶i akińßito, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad. akińßito(****.**.** ) u saka*** a ńßoŇčt…ôi nu r~…ĺipun. ajzaaj a ńßoŇčt…ôi. ****.*.* ma ¶akat, u ŇčaŇčan nu ńßoŇčt…ôi sa ¶i piŇč ¶ńß…ôn. ¶jama niza sa ¶i ¶awńß…ô ńßoŇčt…ôi. ¶ina niza sa ¶i siŇča ¶ńßun. u sakakaaj a wawa ¶iniza. i zikuz nu sakatusa a par~…ĺ…ô ¶awaw nu kitakit, inaji Ē~ ° tu tat…ôŇčaaj a kinr~…ĺi ku r~…ĺipun ńßoŇčt…ôi. amiazińß ku ¶udad atu misur~…ĺit ŇčaŇčan ¶iniza maka maŇčasiw ****. mikir~…ĺ…ôńß maka *** a r~…ĺabaŇč atu sauŇčaj nu binawr~…ĺan. maka ** a sar~…ĺisin ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶a. u ŇčaŇčan niza u ŇčaŇčan nu ńßur~…ĺam: **** u ŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺipun: ** kakuniza nasur~…ĺitan nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika akińßito is tńß…ô …ômp…ôror of *apan. ńß…ô is tńß…ô ***tńß …ômp…ôror of ńßis r~…ĺin…ô a ¶ ¶ordiŇč to *apan Ē~ °s traditionar~…ĺ ord…ôr of su ¶ ¶…ôssion. akińßito su ¶ ¶…ô…ôd…ôd to tńß…ô ¶ńßrjsantńß…ômum tńßron…ô upon ńßis fatńß…ôr …ômp…ôror sńß*wa (ńßirońßito) Ē~ °s d…ôatńß on * *anuarj ****. akińßito is …ô*p…ô ¶t…ôd to abdi ¶at…ô in r~…ĺat…ô mar ¶ńß ****.
S.FORM: == Akihito == u siwkay niza 12 a bulad 23 a demiad, Akihito, u misingkiway. 1933 a mihcan nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Japan ayza sa ci Akihito, micakat a demiad sa i 1989 a mihcan 1 a bulad 7 a demiad. Akihito(1993.12.23 ) u saka125 a Hongtei nu Lipun. ayzaay a Hongtei. 1989.1.7 macakat, u ngangan nu Hongtei sa ci Pingchen. cyama niza sa ci Cawhe Hongtei. cina niza sa ci Singachun. u sakakaay a wawa ciniza. i zikuz nu sakatusa a palecawaw nu kitakit, inayi' tu tatengaay a kinli ku Lipun Hongtei. amiazih ku cudad atu misulit ngangan ciniza maka mangasiw 1000. mikileh maka 200 a labang atu saungay nu binawlan. maka 20 a salisin cacay a mihca. u ngangan niza u ngangan nu Hulam: śėéšĽĀŚ§©Áöá u ngangan nu Lipun: śėéšĽĀ kakuniza nasulitan nu Hulam atu Amilika Akihito is the Emperor of Japan. He is the 125th Emperor of his line according to Japan's traditional order of succession. Akihito succeeded to the Chrysanthemum Throne upon his father Emperor ShŇćwa (Hirohito)'s death on 7 January 1989. Akihito is expected to abdicate in late March 2019.
